hero.sub: Employers stream your wages into a time-locked vault. You watch every won accrue in real time. If payday fails, the evidence is already on-chain.

problem.title: Workers find out too late
problem.body: Korea has one of the highest wage-arrears rates in the OECD. Factory staff, delivery riders, part-timers and foreign laborers discover their employer can't pay only when payday fails — then spend months assembling evidence for the labor office.
problem.point1Body: Solvency is invisible until the money doesn't arrive.
problem.point2Body: Pay stubs, messages, bank records — assembled by hand, contested for months.
problem.point3Body: The worker carries the entire burden of proof against the employer.

how.title: How IMGEUM works
how.step1Body: A verified employer opens a time-locked vault per worker, per pay period, and funds it continuously.
how.step2Body: Your earned balance accrues every second. On GIWA's 1-second blocks, the counter is alive — not a monthly surprise.
how.step3Body: Pull vested-and-funded wages the instant you want them. Settlement is near-instant on GIWA.
how.step4Body: If the vault is short at the deadline, anyone can mint a permanent, timestamped evidence record — court and labor-office ready.

why.title: Why GIWA
why.flashBody: A wage stream is only convincing if it visibly moves. GIWA's 1s blocks and 200ms preconfirmations make the counter tick in real time.
why.dojangBody: Employers register through Dojang, so a worker knows the vault belongs to the real registered company — not an impostor.
why.upidBody: Workers and employers are addressed by name.up.id — never a raw hex address.

cta.title: Make your wages provable
cta.body: Open the worker view, or register your company and show workers you pay on time.
